description_long: This object is an open hardcover book with two thick, rectangular sections lying flat on a maroon surface, which appears to be the book's cover. The left side displays a visible page with a decorative border and lines of text, while the right side is a solid, featureless block, possibly representing a closed section or a blank page. The book's cover is a deep maroon color, and the visible page is a light beige with faint, elegant script. The binding in the center is slightly indented, suggesting a traditional hardcover construction. The overall appearance is clean and formal, with no visible illustrations or embellishments on the cover.
description: An open hardcover book with a maroon cover, one visible page with text, and a blank block on the opposite side.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the bottom edge, showing the open pages with the left side displaying text and the right side appearing as a solid block.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the open book with a visible page of text on the left and a blank, solid section on the right, both resting on a maroon cover.
description_view_2: Viewed from the top edge, the book's open form is clear, with the left side showing the edge of a page and the right side a featureless block.
description_view_3: From the right side, the book's open layout is visible, with the text page on the right and the blank block on the left, both on a maroon base.
